channel.description: This blog will be about projects I worked on in 350

item.title: About Me
item.dc:creator: Caleb Juedes
item.link: https://Calebjuedes26.github.io# you must change this appropriately for RSS feeds to work properly/posts/
item.description: Hello everyone my name is Caleb Juedes. I am currently a senior at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln. In this blog you will find projects that I have created through lessons learned in SPMC 350 to create data visualizations. There will be two major projects this website will highlight. The first one being about Nebraska mens basketball Pryce Sanford and how we ranked among other great huskers and the rest of the field this year and the second project will be determined.
item.guid: https://Calebjuedes26.github.io# you must change this appropriately for RSS feeds to work properly/posts/
